items.how_used: 构建多元回归模型，从多个经济与自然因素中筛选出三个显著预测变量：过去一周汽油价格变化、原油价格变化和埃克森美孚股票价格。
items.source_excerpt: We constructed a multiple regression model from 2011 data and reduced it through AIC-selection, until only three significant predictor variables remained: the change in gasoline and crude oil price from the past week and the value of Exxon-Mobil stock.

items.how_used: 使用AIC准则进行变量选择，从多个候选变量中逐步剔除不显著的变量，最终保留三个预测变量。
items.source_excerpt: We constructed a multiple regression model from 2011 data and reduced it through AIC-selection, until only three significant predictor variables remained

items.how_used: 将汽油价格变化百分比分为五个五分位数，对每个五分位数拟合多元正态分布，生成概率预测，并计算模型相对于零假设的似然比。
items.source_excerpt: We split the possible percent changes in gasoline price into five quintiles, then used the 2011 training data to fit the parameters of each quintile to a multivariate normal distribution. ... we showed that our model was 1020 times more likely than the null hypothesis.

items.how_used: 使用2011年数据作为训练集，2012年数据作为测试集，评估模型的预测性能。
items.source_excerpt: Testing the model on 2012 data, we obtained, for each week, the probabilities that the change in gas would be in each of the five quintiles.

items.how_used: 使用阈值决策策略：根据预测的价格变化概率，设定阈值来决定购买半箱油还是满箱油，并通过训练数据优化阈值。
items.source_excerpt: we used the idea of thresholds: if the predicted change in price is above a certain threshold, we advise the consumer to buy more gas (a full tank instead of a half tank, or a half tank instead of nothing). We found the optimal thresholds by training on 2011 data

items.how_used: 通过比较实际节省与理想节省的比值来计算效率，作为模型性能的度量。
items.source_excerpt: We calculated the efficiency of our strategy by comparing the resulting savings to the best possible savings.

items.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：摘要、引言（背景、问题重述、假设）、模型（变量识别、预测、决策）、讨论、附录、参考文献。
items.source_excerpt: The paper includes sections: Letter to the Local Newspaper, Introduction (Background, Problem Restatement, Global Assumptions), Model (Identification of Significant Variables, Price Prediction, Decision Model), Discussion, Appendices, Bibliography.

items.how_used: 使用折线图展示美国汽油消费趋势（1935-2005），并配有图标题和编号。
items.source_excerpt: Figure 1: Trend of gasoline consumption in the US from 1935 to 2005
